log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 42/59
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 30/59
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 19/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Escapist --- HP: 19/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Escapist --- HP: 19/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Escapist --- HP: 19/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
